captain_logic: Salah: APEX cum_pts rule + template captain with Haaland out, sim-lab median 16.3 vs Bowen 12.3
captain_reason: APEX LOCKED rule: captain = season cum_pts leader among owned nailed premiums. Salah is AVAILABLE and confirmed the new template captain with Haaland unavailable. sim-lab captain median 16.3 (Salah) > 12.3 (Bowen). No differential trigger fired. Bowen = vice (next-best haul ceiling, 90-min nailed).
key_risks: Gvardiol started ONLY to satisfy the 3-DEF minimum (Guardiola confirmed bench, expect ~0). With Gabriel OUT for the season and the only other fit DEF being Aina+Munoz, no better third defender exists in the squad.
Liverpool likely already champions - dead-rubber/managed-minutes risk could cap Salah's ceiling below his 16.3 captain median.
Forest trio (Aina, Anderson, Wood all ~80%) plus Rogers (75%, Europa final rotation) carry correlated final-day rotation risk.
Thin bench: Raya (zero, ARS rotating), Gabriel (OUT), Haaland (unavailable) provide no real auto-sub cover beyond Kluivert - any further XI dropout is uncovered.
